general.name: lvm_qa
general.short: Summary quality-assessment table for LVM DR20 exposures.
general.description: Summary QA/QC FITS data product for LVM DR20 exposures, containing one row per exposure with target identifiers, a packed QA bitmask, and decoded per-metric QA flags for DRP and DAP quality assessment. The metrics summarize automated and visual checks discussed for the DR20 QA process, including sky brightness, flux calibration, wavelength calibration, flat-fielding, sky subtraction, DAP fitting quality, and visual inspection flags.
general.generated_by: LVM QA workflow and lvmqa scripts used for DR20 DRP/DAP quality assessment.

changelog.description: Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another

hdu0.name: PRIMARY
hdu0.description: Primary HDU with no data array; included for FITS compliance and global file metadata.

hdu1.name: QA
hdu1.description: Binary table containing one row per DR20 exposure with exposure identifiers, target type, a packed QA bitmask, and decoded QA flags for the DR20 DRP and DAP quality-control metrics.

header.value: 2-bit fields packed LSB-first in this order (see DESC extension): bright stars, sky brightness, absflux, relflux br, relflux rz, wavecal b, wavecal r, wavecal z, flatfield, sky contsub, sky linesub, dap npfit, dap pmfit, visual drp, visual dap

expnum.name: expnum
expnum.description: Unique exposure number identifying the observation; provided by the DRP summary table used for the DR20 QA workflow.

mjd.name: mjd
mjd.description: Modified Julian Date of the observation.

tileid.name: tileid
tileid.description: Identifier of the LVM tile associated with the exposure.

target_type.name: target_type
target_type.description: Target-type code indicating if the exposure is of a target in the Milky Way (0), Malleganic Clouds (1), or a Local Volume galaxy (2).

qa_bitmask.name: qa_bitmask
qa_bitmask.description: Packed QA bitmask using 2-bit fields stored least-significant-bit first in the metric order documented in the QA header and DESC extension; encoding is GOOD=00, WARNING=01, MAJOR ISSUE=10, UNDEFINED=11.

qa_brightstars.name: qa_brightstars
qa_brightstars.description: Decoded QA flag for contamination or quality impact from bright stars in the field.
qa_brightstars.unit: 2-bit QA flag encoded as GOOD, WARNING, MAJOR ISSUE, or UNDEFINED

qa_sky_brt.name: qa_sky_brt
qa_sky_brt.description: Decoded QA flag for sky brightness conditions during the exposure, related to quantities such as lunar fractional illumination, Moon altitude, Moon separation, and twilight conditions.
qa_sky_brt.unit: 2-bit QA flag encoded as GOOD, WARNING, MAJOR ISSUE, or UNDEFINED

qa_absflux.name: qa_absflux
qa_absflux.description: Decoded QA flag for absolute flux-calibration quality based on comparisons with external photometric datasets (Gaia stars in the field).
qa_absflux.unit: 2-bit QA flag encoded as GOOD, WARNING, MAJOR ISSUE, or UNDEFINED

qa_relflux_br.name: qa_relflux_br
qa_relflux_br.description: Decoded QA flag for relative flux calibration between the blue and red spectrograph arms, used to assess spectrophotometric stability and possible continuum jumps between arms.
qa_relflux_br.unit: 2-bit QA flag encoded as GOOD, WARNING, MAJOR ISSUE, or UNDEFINED

qa_relflux_rz.name: qa_relflux_rz
qa_relflux_rz.description: Decoded QA flag for relative flux calibration between the red and infrared/z spectrograph arms, used to assess spectrophotometric stability and possible continuum jumps between arms.
qa_relflux_rz.unit: 2-bit QA flag encoded as GOOD, WARNING, MAJOR ISSUE, or UNDEFINED

qa_wavecal_b.name: qa_wavecal_b
qa_wavecal_b.description: Decoded QA flag for wavelength-calibration quality in the blue channel, assessed using prominent night-sky lines.
qa_wavecal_b.unit: 2-bit QA flag encoded as GOOD, WARNING, MAJOR ISSUE, or UNDEFINED

qa_wavecal_r.name: qa_wavecal_r
qa_wavecal_r.description: Decoded QA flag for wavelength-calibration quality in the red channel, assessed using prominent night-sky lines.
qa_wavecal_r.unit: 2-bit QA flag encoded as GOOD, WARNING, MAJOR ISSUE, or UNDEFINED

qa_wavecal_z.name: qa_wavecal_z
qa_wavecal_z.description: Decoded QA flag for wavelength-calibration quality in the infrared/z channel, assessed using prominent night-sky lines.
qa_wavecal_z.unit: 2-bit QA flag encoded as GOOD, WARNING, MAJOR ISSUE, or UNDEFINED

qa_flatfield.name: qa_flatfield
qa_flatfield.description: Decoded QA flag for flat-fielding quality, assessed using fiber-by-fiber behaviour of the prominent night-sky lines.
qa_flatfield.unit: 2-bit QA flag encoded as GOOD, WARNING, MAJOR ISSUE, or UNDEFINED

qa_skycont_sub.name: qa_skycont_sub
qa_skycont_sub.description: Decoded QA flag for sky-continuum subtraction quality, based on residual continuum levels after sky subtraction.
qa_skycont_sub.unit: 2-bit QA flag encoded as GOOD, WARNING, MAJOR ISSUE, or UNDEFINED

qa_skyline_sub.name: qa_skyline_sub
qa_skyline_sub.description: Decoded QA flag for sky-emission-line subtraction quality, based on residuals for selected sky lines or regions such as [OI]5577, [OH]6865, [Na]5891, and O2.
qa_skyline_sub.unit: 2-bit QA flag encoded as GOOD, WARNING, MAJOR ISSUE, or UNDEFINED

qa_dap_npfit.name: qa_dap_npfit
qa_dap_npfit.description: Decoded QA flag for the consistency between the DAP parametric and non-parametric emission-line measurements.
qa_dap_npfit.unit: 2-bit QA flag encoded as GOOD, WARNING, MAJOR ISSUE, or UNDEFINED

qa_dap_pmfit.name: qa_dap_pmfit
qa_dap_pmfit.description: Decoded QA flag for the quality of DAP parametric emission-line fitting, based on the residuals after the Gaussian model subtraction for the bright emission lines.
qa_dap_pmfit.unit: 2-bit QA flag encoded as GOOD, WARNING, MAJOR ISSUE, or UNDEFINED

qa_visual_drp.name: qa_visual_drp
qa_visual_drp.description: Decoded QA flag from visual inspection of DRP products, including SFrame-level artifacts and data-quality issues identified during the DR20 inspection process.
qa_visual_drp.unit: 2-bit QA flag encoded as GOOD, WARNING, MAJOR ISSUE, or UNDEFINED

qa_visual_dap.name: qa_visual_dap
qa_visual_dap.description: Decoded QA flag from visual inspection of DAP products, including maps, fits, residuals, and other DAP-level artifacts identified during the DR20 inspection process.
qa_visual_dap.unit: 2-bit QA flag encoded as GOOD, WARNING, MAJOR ISSUE, or UNDEFINED

hdu2.name: DESC
hdu2.description: Binary table documenting the QA metrics encoded in the QA extension, including the bit positions, metric descriptions, and criteria for WARNING and MAJOR ISSUE flags.

Metric.name: Metric
Metric.description: Name of the QA metric corresponding to one decoded QA flag and one packed 2-bit field in qa_bitmask.

Bits.name: Bits
Bits.description: Bit positions assigned to the metric within the packed qa_bitmask.

Description.name: Description
Description.description: Text description of the QA metric and the data-quality aspect it summarizes.

WARNING.name: WARNING
WARNING.description: Criterion or explanatory text for assigning the WARNING state to the metric; exact quantitative thresholds may be provided in the DR20 webpages.

MAJOR ISSUE.name: MAJOR ISSUE
MAJOR ISSUE.description: Criterion or explanatory text for assigning the MAJOR ISSUE state to the metric; exact quantitative thresholds may be provided in the DR20 webpages.
